item.title: Why is Him Teknoforge Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-May, Him Teknoforge Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 4.12%, closing at ₹205.80, reflecting a continuation of recent downward pressure despite its strong long-term performance relative to the benchmark Sensex. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13 May, Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹428.95, down by 1.05% or ₹4.55. This movement reflects a continuation of recent underperformance despite some positive operational metrics. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is NCC Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13 May, NCC Ltd's stock price declined by 1.36% to ₹159.45, continuing a downward trend influenced by recent profit falls and underperformance relative to the broader market. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is Aryaman Financial Services Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-May, Aryaman Financial Services Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.15% to close at ₹592.55. This drop reflects a combination of subdued investor interest and technical headwinds, despite the stock’s strong long-term performance relative to the broader market. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Has JSW Energy Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, JSW Energy Ltd has declared a dividend of 20%, amounting to ₹2 per share, with an ex-date of June 5, 2026. The dividend yield is 0.38%, and the company has demonstrated strong long-term performance despite some short-term fluctuations. Time: May 13 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Ponni Sugars (Erode) Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Ponni Sugars (Erode) Ltd has declared a 50% dividend, amounting to ₹3 per share, with an ex-date of May 30, 2025. The company has shown mixed total returns over various periods, with strong long-term performance despite some short to medium-term declines. Time: May 13 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd has declared a dividend of 700% (70 per share) with an ex-date of May 15, 2026. The company has shown strong total returns, particularly 32.54% over the past year and 77.93% over the past two years. Time: May 13 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Corona Remedies Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Corona Remedies Ltd has declared a 100% dividend with an ex-date of June 19, 2026. However, the dividend yield is 0%, and total returns have been mixed, with a 7.52% return in the last 3 months but no returns over longer periods. Time: May 13 2026 11:30 PM IST
